message: [MEDIUM] fcp-registry: add reinstall verification fuzz coverage

files.patch:
@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@ ciborium = "0.2.2"
 semver = "1.0.27"
 serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0.145"
+sha2 = "0.10"
 
 fcp-async-core = { path = "../crates/fcp-async-core" }
 fcp-audit = { path = "../crates/fcp-audit" }
@@ -182,6 +183,13 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_registry_manifest_verify"
+path = "fuzz_targets/registry_manifest_verify.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_bootstrap_recovery"
 path = "fuzz_targets/bootstrap_recovery.rs"
